name: Schooters & Co.
address: 2241 Foothill Blvd Ste B, Rock Springs, WY 82901
about: Schooters & Co. is a golf simulator venue located in Rock Springs, Wyoming. The facility features industry-leading Trackman radar technology across three bays, offering players advanced ball monitoring and a comprehensive suite of golf tools. Pricing is straightforward at $35 per hour for up to four players, with the option to purchase punch passes or memberships. The venue is designed for a casual, accessible experience, welcoming all players without requiring a membership for bookings.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman radar technology provides precise ball tracking
Flexible group pricing at a flat rate of $35/hour for up to four players
No membership required to book, making it accessible for all
Online booking system with easy bay unlocking via a 4-digit code

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service; policy not specified
No mention of on-site alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology available in all 3 bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided or required. Players should assume they need to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not have a policy on outside food or drinks. Players are encouraged to clean up after themselves.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for playing 18 holes, but bookings are made in hourly increments at $35 per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, as it encourages family outings and does not require memberships for bookings.
